title: Update: Community rally to support rescue services
description: GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - MMC for community...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - MMC for community safety Marais Kruger, spoke to George Herald at 04:00 this morning about the amazing volunteers who have been helping at the scene of George's biggest disaster since early yesterday afternoon when a building under construction collapsed at 14:09.


> According to George Municipality, 24 people have been extracted from the rubble.


Emergency personnel from the City of Cape Town and Breede Valley Local Municipality have joined the emergency and disaster personnel on site and continue the search for the 51 unaccounted persons trapped.

VIDEO: Marais Kruger, MMC for community safety

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Tables with donations and volunteers who have been working around the clock. Photos: Kristy Kolberg

Previous articles:

- Update on Building Collapse, Victoria Street: 24 patients extracted
- Update on building collapse, Victoria Street: 23 patients extracted
- Update on building collapse, Victoria Street - George
- Assistance for Emergency workers
- 70 workers on site as building collapses
- Update: Body retrieved from building rubble
- Premier responds to disaster in George
- Workers trapped in building rubble
- Update: Building collapse in Victoria Street
- Building collapse in Victoria Street

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
